basic_details.job_title: BHU Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Artist, Assistant Curator and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Non-teaching Notification 2026 has been released on 09 June 2026 on the official website https://www.bhu.ac.in. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the BHU Non-teaching Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per GoI rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen. No age bar for permanent BHU employees. Service period in projects/contract counted for relaxation.
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GoI rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen. No age bar for permanent BHU employees. Service period in projects/contract counted for relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Museology/AIHC & Archaeology/History of Art/Archaeology/Heritage Management/Heritage Studies, Bachelor's degree in Fine Arts, Bachelor's Degree with Diploma in Photography, Intermediate
qualification.details: Assistant Curator: Master's degree in Museology/AIHC & Archaeology/History of Art/Archaeology/Heritage Management/Heritage Studies with minimum 55% marks or equivalent. Diploma in Museology (except candidates with Master's degree in Museology) OR at least one paper related to Exhibition Management/Museum Studies. Artist: Bachelor's degree in Fine Arts. Five years' experience in techniques of traditional Indian (Rajasthani, Pahari, Mughal) painting OR Commercial Art as applicable to museum's work viz. designing exhibitions/posters/publicity material etc. Assistant Photographer: Bachelor's Degree in Fine Arts with Photography OR Bachelor's Degree with Diploma in Photography from a recognised institution. One year's professional experience in photography and digital image processing. Junior Darner: Intermediate. Five years' experience in working on relevant areas in a museum. Gallery Attendant: Intermediate.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BHU Non-teaching Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form and pay the application fee is 08 July 2026. Ensure all steps are completed by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) has announced a total of 17 vacancies for various Non-teaching Posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Gallery Attendant post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Gallery Attendant post is Intermediate.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST category and for women candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Curator post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Curator post comes under Level 1 to Level 6 of the pay matrix, with a salary ranging from Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 1,12,400.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection methods for these BHU Non-teaching posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally Document Verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, or by visiting the official BHU website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age relaxation policy for BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: Age relaxation is provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen. Permanent BHU employees have no age bar.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications for BHU Non-teaching Posts must be submitted strictly through the online mode via the official BHU website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Banaras Hindu University?
faq.answer: The official website of Banaras Hindu University is http://bhu.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and updates.
